summary: Iteration 5 testing completed successfully. All features verified working: Attendance page search input, registration notes visible with MessageSquare icon, attendance defaults to 'present' auto-created on load, Meldingen page with filter tabs, sidebar has Meldingen link, Dashboard unread-only feed, registrations sorted by createdAt desc.
passed_tests: PRIO: Login and attendance page has search input (data-testid='attendance-search-input') - VERIFIED
PRIO: Attendance page shows registration notes with MessageSquare icon - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/attendance/by-date/2026-03-10 returns moments with auto-created attendance isPresent=true - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/notifications/absence-feed returns feed items with read status - VERIFIED
Backend: PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read marks notification as read - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/registrations/my sorted by createdAt desc - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/registrations sorted by createdAt desc - VERIFIED
Frontend: /meldingen page loads and shows notifications - VERIFIED
Frontend: Meldingen page has filter tabs (Alles/Ongelezen) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Meldingen' link with Bell icon - VERIFIED
Frontend: Dashboard shows unread absence feed only (removes on mark read) - VERIFIED
Frontend: My Registrations page shows 'Aanwezigheid' column with status - VERIFIED
Frontend: My Registrations shows absence banner (3 leerlingen afwezig gemeld) - VERIFIED
Frontend: Admin Registrations table sorted by newest first - VERIFIED
Frontend: Attendance page search filters students by name/class - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI features verified working via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: None needed - existing test data used (Test Student 1-20 with notes 'Test registration')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features tested and verified. Key features: (1) Attendance page at /aanwezigheden has search input and displays registration notes with MessageSquare icon. (2) Attendance records auto-create as isPresent=true when loading page. (3) Meldingen page at /meldingen with Alles/Ongelezen filter tabs. (4) Sidebar has Meldingen link with Bell icon. (5) Dashboard only shows unread notifications, marked ones disappear. (6) Registrations sorted by createdAt desc (newest first). (7) My Registrations shows 'Aanwezigheid' column and absence banner.

mocked_apis.Email sending: Email functionality is MOCKED (non-functional) as documented

key_verification_notes.attendance_search: Search input at /aanwezigheden filters students by name or class
key_verification_notes.registration_notes: Notes displayed under student name with amber MessageSquare icon
key_verification_notes.meldingen_page: New /meldingen page shows all absence notifications with filter tabs
key_verification_notes.dashboard_unread_only: Dashboard absence feed only shows unread items, marking read removes them
key_verification_notes.sorting_order: Registrations sorted by createdAt desc not date desc
